arts.ttl: Arsenal ratings: Saka, Trossard star in dramatic win vs. Leicester
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard were stellar for Arsenal, who bounced back after losing a two-goal lead to win it late against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: ‘There’s a case’: Paul Merson says £75m Liverpool player might not get into the Arsenal team
arts.sum: Paul Merson caused quite a stir this week with some comments about Manchester City’s Rodri. The pundit stated that Rodri is the only player in...

arts.ttl: Leicester ratings v Arsenal as Hermansen's inspired display can't stop late loss
arts.sum: A special James Justin volley and an inspired Mads Hermansen performance looked like earning Steve Cooper his best result of the season so far as City came from two goals down to level. Vardy won the free-kick, Buonanotte crossed, and Justin, with just City’s second touch in the Arsenal box, flicked a header goalwards, a deflection off Havertz taking it past David Raya.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 4-2 Leicester PLAYER RATINGS: Who was the Gunners' 'outstanding player'? Which star should have put the hosts 'out of sight'? And who lacked quality with their distribution?
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT AT THE EMIRATES: After a dominant start to the game, Arsenal went in front through Gabriel Martinelli before Leandro Trossard doubled their advantage.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 4-2 Leicester: Highlights, man of the match, stats from six-goal thriller
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard scores a last-gasp winning goal as Arsenal incredibly hold off a Leicester City fightback to prevail 3-2 at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings vs Leicester: Leandro Trossard comes up clutch again as Gabriel Martinelli dazzles
arts.sum: Gunners turn to benefit from last-gasp drama a week on from Manchester City clash

arts.ttl: Arsenal strike twice in stoppage time to see off stubborn Leicester
arts.sum: The Foxes had come from two goals down to level.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 4-2 Leicester: Leandro Trossard and Kai Havertz score in added time after a James Justin brace had stunned the Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES STADIUM: At times, it felt like Arsenal vs Mads Hermansen. The Danish goalkeeper had become the architect for Leicester to nearly walk away with something.

arts.ttl: 'Arsenal will need him': Martin Keown wowed by £6m Arsenal talent who was 'flying' in today's win
arts.sum: Arsenal left it late to secure all three points in Saturday’s Premier League victory over Leicester City. The Gunners ran out 4-2 winners over the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal earn dramatic Leicester win to take advantage of Man City slip - 5 talking points
arts.sum: Arsenal 4-2 Leicester City: Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard goals looked to be enough to earn Mikel Arteta's side victory at the Emirates but James Justin had other plans
